name: web3-bike-sharing
description: Decentralized bike-sharing platform built on Web3 principles

scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:polygon: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network polygon
scripts.setup: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Web3 Bike Sharing Team
